docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $524.02 FILED BY KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE AS TO DEFENDANT RHODER, LEO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-13-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
